_README: Minimal skeleton for a new chapter JSON file. Copy to questions/chXYZ.json, fill in metadata and questions, then run the restructure/validate/audio workflow in WORKFLOW.md. Do NOT author the tts_* / choice_id fields here — _restructure_chapter.py generates them from question/text/explanation. You only need the 'raw' fields shown below.

tts_policy.note: すべての文字列は日本語読み上げ可能な形式で記述。化学式・数式は日本語名に置換済み。単位は『度』『モル』『パーセント』等の語に統一。

trap_type_legend.keyword_swap: キーワード1語をすり替え
trap_type_legend.property_swap: 物質の性質を別物質と入れ替え

questions._comment_for_author: Authoring rules: (1) Write question/choices[].text/explanation in TTS-friendly Japanese (kanji numerals, unit words, no chemical formulas, no symbols). _restructure_chapter.py will COPY these into tts_* and then convert the display-side question/text/explanation to ARABIC numerals + unit symbols + major formulas. (2) Do NOT set choice_id or tts_* yourself — the restructure script assigns them. (3) Ensure exactly one choice has is_correct=true per question. (4) In 'explanation', you may refer to wrong choices as '選択肢一' '選択肢二' ... (KANJI) using ORIGINAL positions; _restructure_chapter.py remaps them to NEW positions after shuffling, and a separate rewrite step converts them to content-based wording for audio. (5) Keep category, trap_type, trap_detail, difficulty fields consistent with ch1-1.json examples.
questions.question: <問題文（TTSフレンドリー：漢数字・単位語・日本語化学名）>

choices.text: <選択肢2本文（これが正解なら label はそのままで is_correct のみ true にする）>

questions.explanation: <解説本文。誤答選択肢に言及する際は『選択肢一は…、選択肢三は…』のように漢数字で書く（_restructure_chapter.py がシャッフル後の新番号へ自動で書き換える）。>
